OptionDisplayName.SourceString: Amount To Change On Received Signal
OptionDisplayName.LocalizedString: Amount To Change On Received Signal

OptionDescription.SourceString: Determines how much to increment/decrement the Tracker's value by each time Increment/Decrement Progress When Receiving From is triggered.
OptionDescription.LocalizedString: Determines how much to increment/decrement the Tracker's value by each time Increment/Decrement Progress When Receiving From is triggered.
